prestazioni: Engine: Ford EcoBoost 1.6L (Fox GTDI - engine code: M16GTD) with a Mountune MP275 upgrade kit, including forged internals (Mahle Motorsport pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods), upgraded oil pump (Ford Performance high-volume unit), and a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger with a 0.63 A/R turbine housing for optimized spool on the ST200's compact manifold

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB helical LSD with 4.06 final drive ratio (Ford Performance Motorsport gearset) paired with a Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel and uprated clutch (Sachs Power Clutch Stage 2 with cerametallic friction material) for aggressive launches

Suspension: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Fiesta ST-specific valving) with Eibach Pro-Spacer 15mm wheel spacers (hub-centric, 5x108 bolt pattern) and Whiteline adjustable rear toe arms (ST200-specific fitment) for precise alignment under high lateral loads
estetica: Aero: Custom ST200-specific Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (polyurethane fenders, carbon fiber front splitter, and rear diffuser) with a 3M 1080 Gloss Black vinyl wrap on the OEM Recaro seats' side bolsters for contrast

Exterior: OEM+ Ford Performance rear diffuser (ST200-specific, part #M-14A400-A) with a Milltek Sport 76mm titanium exhaust system (cat-back, ST200-specific fitment) and Hella Pagid Super Sports brake pads (compound 801) paired with dimpled/slotted rotors (DBA 4000 Series)

Interior: Sparco Evo II 10-way adjustable seats (Fiesta ST200-specific mounting brackets) with a MOMO Mod.77 steering wheel (320mm, suede, ST200 airbag-compatible) and a custom Alcantara shift boot (ST-specific shifter opening) from Seibon Carbon
